name: multi-agent-orchestrator
description: Coordinates multiple Claude Code agents working on different projects simultaneously

scripts.start: npm run build && npm run build:web && node dist/index.js
scripts.build:backend-macos-arm64: npm run build && npx pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-macos-arm64 --output src-tauri/binaries/orchestrator-backend-aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:backend-macos-x64: npm run build && npx pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-macos-x64 --output src-tauri/binaries/orchestrator-backend-x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:backend-linux-x64: npm run build && npx pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-linux-x64 --output src-tauri/binaries/orchestrator-backend-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.build:backend-windows-x64: npm run build && npx pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output src-tauri/binaries/orchestrator-backend-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:backend-macos-arm64 && npm run build:backend-macos-x64
scripts.build:all-backends: npm run build:backend-macos-arm64 && npm run build:backend-macos-x64 && npm run build:backend-linux-x64 && npm run build:backend-windows-x64
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build:web && npm run build:backend && cd src-tauri && cargo tauri build
scripts.tauri:build-universal: npm run build:web && npm run build:backend && cd src-tauri && cargo tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin
